feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Apps
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Apps Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: PT-BR - Estou com um problema de mudança de instância de Firebase dentro do Sap Build Apps.
entry.content:
(PT-BR 🇧🇷) Iniciamos um projeto em dezembro de 2023, e agora vamos coloca-lo em produção, é um App mobile e um sistema WEb para administração de um farmácia de doação de medicamentos, migramos a base de dados para a conta Firebase que irá arcar com os custos de armazenamento de dados e hospedagem, porém ao mudar as credenciais dentro do DATA do Sap Build App, ele não aceitas as novas credenciais, continua enviando os dados para o banco de testes e desenvolvimento, o que pode esta acontecendo, mesmo exportando o projeto e subindo ele em outra conta do SAP Build, o erro permanece. 

---------------------------------------------------------------------

(EN-🇺🇸) We started a project in December 2023, and now we are going to put it into production, it is a mobile App and a WEb system for managing a medicine donation pharmacy, we migrated the database to the Firebase account which will bear the costs of data storage and hosting, however, when changing the credentials within the DATA of the Sap Build App, it does not accept the new credentials, it continues sending the data to the test and development bench, which may be happening , even exporting the project and uploading it to another SAP Build account, the error remains.

entry.title: SAP appgyver migrate to SAP build apps
entry.content: I hope this message finds you well. I am reaching out to you on behalf of Digitus, a SAP partnership company. We are currently facing a critical issue regarding one of our applications developed using the AppGyver old community edition. Unfortunately, due to oversight, we missed the migration deadline before January 31 to transition our application to SAP Build Apps. As a result, we are unable to locate our application within the AppGyver platform. Our application is hosted on the SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) Cloud Foundry, serving numerous clients who rely on its functionalities for their operations. Regrettably, without access to our project, we are unable to perform essential updates and maintenance, which are crucial for the seamless operation of our clients' businesses. I kindly ask for help how to find my project in SAP appgyver project in community edition and requesting a solution to migrate this project to SAP build apps. Thank you for your understanding and assistance.

entry.title: Difference between SAP Automation Pilot and SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Can anyone explain the difference between SAP Automation Pilot and SAP Build Process Automation?  Can SAP Build Apps work with either or both of these?

Thanks.

Ron

entry.title: Unable to Create SAP build Automation application on SAP BTP account
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

Please i am going throught the learning journey for SAP Build on SAP BTP, following the instructions there i noticed that i couldn't subscribe to an SAP Build Process Automation application. I always get an error when i try to do so. They recommended that I ask for help here in the community. Please I would appreciate every help I can get. Thanks in advance. See error screen shot below.

entry.title: SAP BTP Deploy Error in CAP Project
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I got error in Deploying the Cap project in Business Application Studio . #SAP CAP

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - Teams Screen Sharing - Android Phone
entry.content:
SAP Build Apps 

Hello team,

I cannot screen-share with clients SAP Build Apps because whenever I try to screen-share on Microsoft Teams the application is displayed as a black screen (while working normally on the phone). Is there a way to fix this? The screen share works on iPhone phones, but it doesn't on Android phones (which I'm using right now). This makes presentations with clients really tedious because they lack an important part during the live demo.

Thank you

SAP Build Apps

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - Basic Table with Adapter and Pagination
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm able to establish an OData integration in SAP Build Apps. I pull in the basic table with adapter and two buttons (Previous and Next) to navigate the pages.

However, the data remains static in the table after the Page Mounted event.

What I'm saying is - the basic table gets populated with data with the Page Mounted event. Every other Event does not refresh the data on the table. 

At first, i thought it was the variables. But I've tried App variables and Page Variables.

Both do not work with the pagination in the basic table with adapter.

The expectation is that with the component tap (button tap), the current page increments or decrements by 1.

The formula works. I've tested it on the Page Mounted event.

I'm even able to get it to display on the page. 

I'm able to get the total number of pages and total number of records.

But the basic table with adapter only gets populated with the Page Mounted event and no other events will get it to refresh.

I've tried modifying the properties of the table but it doesn't have the refresh property. If you create the refresh manually, you can't find the Internal Component that was mentioned in the other blogs.

I've seen a few questions about the Basic Table being populated from other Database via odata but they're running into the same problem.

Yes, i can switch to lists but i really want this basic table with adapter to work with pagination.

Any other recommendations?

I can export and upload my app here if anyone wants to have a look.

entry.title: Can SAP Build Apps be used as a GUI for SAP Automation Pilot?
entry.content:
I am learning SAP Automation Pilot and would like to know if I could use SAP Build Apps as a GUI to pass parameters to Automation Pilot to run processes.

Is that possible?  If so, could someone give me some guidance as to how that might work?

And if not, is there an SAP application that could be used as a GUI for Automation Pilot?

I should point out that in Automation Pilot, I'm connecting to a HANA Commissions RESTApi on GCP, if that makes a difference.

Thanks in advance!

Ron

entry.title: Appgyver Platform
entry.content: I have a problem to access the platform appgyver, since a week the site is showing a message about a security certificate expired, anyone can help me ?

entry.title: [Appgyver App builder] IOS Build fails
entry.content:
Hi, the build fails without any additional details, here is the error stack:

 

Runtime version: 4.9.148; AB version: 2.0.0-alpha.1COMMAND:
npxrnv export -p ios -s standalone_appstore -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @appgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.148 -r --xcodebuildArchiveArgs "OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS=\"--keychain\ AppGyver-81712\""
FAILED with ERROR:
Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p ios -s standalone_appstore -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @appgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.148 -r --xcodebuildArchiveArgs "OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS=\"--keychain\ AppGyver-81712\""

entry.title: Sap AppBuilder IoS compilation error
entry.content:
Hi, starting from the previous week, the IOS building fails with this error:

 

Runtime version: 4.9.148; AB version: 2.0.0-alpha.1 COMMAND: npxrnv export -p ios -s standalone_appstore -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @appgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.148 -r --xcodebuildArchiveArgs "OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS=\"--keychain\ AppGyver-81712\"" FAILED with ERROR: Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p ios -s standalone_appstore -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @appgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.148 -r --xcodebuildArchiveArgs "OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS=\"--keychain\ AppGyver-81712\""

Everything seems to be configured in the right way. please help us!

Please give support to the Appbuilder community!!

entry.title: SAP Build Apps [BUG report] - input field autocapitalisation on native runtime
entry.content:
Dear SAP Build Team,

I'd like to report a recent discovery in regards of the input field component. On the web runtime the 'Autocapitalization' property works just fine and as expected. If it is set to 'sentences' then it does what it says. 

However, on the native runtime (IOS) it ignores the property settings. Autocapitalization is not possible. The input field always shows the values as the user typed them in.

I have tried setting the value to a formula, tried different UI themes, issue is same in Fiori and Universal theme as well. 

If any further information is required, let me know. 
Hope to hear back from you soon.

entry.title: SAP Build App Bug
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I'm testing my application in web browser and it is working fine, able to post the data in database.

But same application if I test in SAP Build Preview App then in that case I'm getting oAuth 2 authorization issue.

I'm calling google firestore database API.

Also after login in web browser I can see all the content getting loaded successfully. But after logging in Mobile Device I'm getting logged in but not data getting displayed.

Refer below screen shot.

REST API

Data Variable Using : Bearer Token

This app works in web browser but not in SAP Build Preview App.

Information is given in this page about signing in with oAuth 2 in firebase doc.

But does anyone have idea how to get [Google_Id_Token] then please drop your answer.

curl 'https://identitytoolkit.googleapis.com/v1/accounts:signInWithIdp?key=[API_KEY]' \
-H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
--data-binary '{"postBody":"id_token=[GOOGLE_ID_TOKEN]&providerId=[google.com]","requestUri":"[http://localhost]","returnIdpCredential":true,"returnSecureToken":true}'

Any idea then please let us know.

Regards,

Ganesh N.

entry.title: App Builder IOS compilation error for imported app
entry.content:
Hi, i'm currently experiencing this issue while compiling my app in Appgyver App Builder Community Edition, here is the error stack, please give some advices and let me build the app:

 

Runtime version: 4.9.148; AB version: 2.0.0-alpha.1COMMAND:
npxrnv export -p ios -s standalone_appstore -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @appgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.148 -r --xcodebuildArchiveArgs "OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS=\"--keychain\ AppGyver-81712\""
FAILED with ERROR:
Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p ios -s standalone_appstore -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @appgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.148 -r --xcodebuildArchiveArgs "OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS=\"--keychain\ AppGyver-81712\""

entry.title: How to recover app in Appgyver
entry.content: Hi, I did not receive the notification about Appgyver to SAP migration. I cannot access the old appgyver app anymore after the migration deadline. Is there any way for rescuing the old app and migrate it to SAP build app now? Thanks!!

entry.title: Preview on your device
entry.content:
I can't view my project on my cell phone using the app. page returns error when confirming PIN.

Open SAP Build Apps app on your device link https://ge-buildapps-us10.cfapps.eu10-004.hana.ondemand.com/launch/ SAP Build Apps your temporary PIN code is XXXXX session failed . 

my cell phone Android

confirm PIN ....

entry.title: Regarding SAP Build Apps Authentication issue
entry.content:
Hello all,

I am Sugandha. I have been using SAP Build Apps for quite some time and I am facing issues while configuring SAP BTP destination REST API integration. When I am testing the inputs, it gives me error 404. I have followed all the steps given in the below tutorial (attaching the link). - https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/build-apps-workflow-trigger.html#23115af3-8c2e-487a-b50a-ecdc7c8a8fce (please refer to step no.5 for my query. I am stuck on that). As per the error, my definition ID is incorrect but I am just copy-pasting it.

Attaching an image for your refernce - 

 

Please guide me. Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Consume OData service from On Premise in SAP Build
entry.content:
Hi,

Greetings!

 

Customer has his BTP accounts setup model as a common CF sub account for multiple business units with no Integration Suite but serverless runtime extension center for now.

Customer would like to start using SAP Build Portfolio (Build Apps, Build Process Automation and Build Work zone Standard Edition) with the above setup and has the following queries - 

1) Backend SAP systems are SAP ECC6 EHP6 on-premise and S4 Hana on-premise in AWS and currently using BTP Serverless Runtime Extension Center for OData Provisioning - can the OData services from these on-premise systems be accessible in SAP Build Apps, Build Process Automation and Build Workzone via extension center? or is exposing services via CAP or RAP the only alternative solution available?

2) With this single sub account setup how can it be ensured that from a security perspective only authorized user of a particular business unit can access an application apart from authorization setup in launchpad and as well as how can other business unit developers be not allowed to access other application code base.

Regards,

Vipin.

SAP Build SAP Build Apps SAP Build Process Automation SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: Need Help on SBPA Concepts Regarding Variables
entry.content:
I'm slowly getting there.  I appreciate all the help and guidance I've been given so far.

For the process I've created, I have an Environment variable that gets passed into the process (more to be added) but I don't want to use a form in the process to gather this information.  I want to create an SAP Build App to get the information from the user and pass it to the Process as it gets executed. 

What I'm unclear about is, since I won't have a form in the Process, is it a good idea to use the Environmental variable to capture the information that's coming from the App or is there a better way to accomplish this?

Any ideas and/or suggestions would be gratefully appreciated.

Thanks!

Ron

entry.title: SAP BTP Cockpit Developer Account
entry.content:
Hello, I created an account to create SAP Build App via SAP BTP Cockpit.
As an admin, I can log in to the Lobby section, but I open accounts for other people to make developments, but they cannot log in to the Lobby section.
I looked at the documentation on this issue, but I couldn't figure it out. Can you help me?
Thanks

My screenshots are as follows.

SAP BTP Cockpit

SAP BTP Cockpit

 

 

 

 

 

SAP BTP Cockpit - Subaccount
SAP BTP Cockpit Subaccounts

 

 

 

 

 

 

SAP BTP Lobby

Build Lobby Login Page
